**Logs**

<!--
For Chrome see https://support.google.com/docs/thread/1873663/collecting-console-logs-chrome-browser-only?hl=en 
For Frefox :

1. In Firefox, click > More Tools > Web Developer Tools.
2. Select the Console tab, if it is not selected by default.
3. Filter categories to include everything, Errors, Warnings, Logs, Info, Debug, CSS, XHR, and Requests...
4. Leave the console open and perform the steps that reproduce the issue.
5. Right-click any line and select Save all Messages to File.
6. Save the file.
-->
